mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM slpmember LEFT OUTER JOIN slpmember_detail USING (mem_num)
id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or nick_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
email LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or email LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM slpmember LEFT OUTER JOIN slpmember_detail USING(mem_num)
id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or nick_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
email LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or email LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY reg_date DESC OFFSET #{skip} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
